header.label: CONVERSATIONAL JOURNAL ENTRY
header.sub: For non-bank transactions only. Bank transactions go through Bank Review.

empty.title: Start recording by describing what happened
empty.subtitle: Haseeb will draft a journal entry, show you the lines, and wait for your confirmation before posting.
empty.example_1: I bought office supplies for 50 KWD with cash
empty.example_2: I received 1000 KWD from client ABC for the consulting contract
empty.example_3: I paid 500 KWD rent with cheque

live.review_and_confirm: Review the draft and confirm to post, or ask me to change something.
live.error_network: I couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

pending.heading: Pending entries
pending.cancelled: Cancelled. The pending entry was removed.
pending.cancel_error: Couldn't cancel this entry. Please refresh.
pending.already_processed: This entry was already handled. Refreshing.

cfo.user_1: I paid the cleaning lady 30 KWD cash today
cfo.aminah_1: Got it — cash payment for cleaning. I need a couple of details before drafting the entry. Which expense account should I post this to?
cfo.aminah_got_debit_suffix: . And which cash account did this come from?
cfo.review_and_confirm: Here's the draft. Review and confirm to post.
cfo.posted: Posted. Hash chain extended. Entry visible in your ledger and audit trail.
cfo.user_2: Record the Zain payment that came in today
cfo.aminah_2: That looks like a bank transaction — it came from your {{bank}} feed. I can't create entries for bank-originated items via conversation. Please review it in Bank Transactions instead.
cfo.aminah_3: I can't draft this without more detail. Which transaction are you referring to? What was the amount and category?

junior.greeting: Hi Sara. What entry do you need to make today?
junior.try_small_example: Try this example: small petty cash entry →
junior.try_large_example: Try this example: large accrual that needs CFO approval →
junior.try_bank_example: Try this example: bank transaction (Aminah refuses) →
junior.user_1: Petty cash for office supplies — 45 KWD
junior.under_threshold: Below the 1,000 KWD threshold — this will post directly when you confirm. Hash chain extends.
junior.aminah_which_expense_bonus: Which expense account for the bonus?
junior.over_threshold: This is 3,200 KWD which is above your 1,000 KWD threshold. When you confirm, I'll send it to the CFO as an approval request — it won't post until the CFO approves.
junior.sent_to_cfo: Sent to CFO. You'll see the response in your Taskbox. Created {{id}}.
junior.user_3: Record the Talabat payout from today
junior.aminah_bank_refuse: That's a bank transaction. It came from {{account}}. Please review it in Bank Transactions instead — I can't draft entries for bank-sourced items here. The deterministic engine handles those directly.
